description_long: This object is a classic Sony Walkman portable cassette player, accompanied by a pair of over-ear headphones and two audio cassette tapes. The main body of the Walkman is rectangular, predominantly red with black and silver accents, and features a transparent window on the front through which the cassette tape is visible. The headphones have a thin, metallic headband with orange foam ear pads and a black cable connecting to the player. The cassette tapes are black with white and gray labels, one of which is partially inserted into the Walkman while the other lies nearby. The Walkman has visible physical buttons and switches on its side for playback control, and a headphone jack at the top. The overall design is compact and portable, reflecting the iconic style of personal audio devices from the 1980s.
description: A red Sony Walkman cassette player with orange foam headphones and two black cassette tapes, featuring physical buttons and a transparent tape window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Walkman's transparent window, cassette tape inside, and the attached headphones with orange foam pads.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the Walkman's thickness, side control buttons, and the stacked cassette tapes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid red back of the Walkman, the headband of the headphones, and the cable trailing behind.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the Walkman's side controls, headphone connection, and the arrangement of the tapes.
